pages.text: A Hellhound is an aggressive creature found in $(item)The Nether$(), often in packs. It will attack remorselessly, and its bite can cause its victim to catch fire. Hellhounds will ignore players unless they attack or get too close.

pages.title: Converting Hellhounds
pages.text: Hellhounds can be turned into normal $(item)Wolves$(), by first inflicting them with a $(item)Potion of Weakness$() and then feeding them a $(item)Golden Apple$(). After some time, the conversion will occur, accelerated if the Hellhound is in a cage made of $(item)Iron Bars$() wide at most 7 blocks.
